features: Tough Stuff Heavy Duty Hand Cleaner - 450ml.
Eco-friendly granules and added conditioner to quickly remove deeply ingrained oil and grease.
Lime scented to leave the skin smooth and delicately fragranced after use.
Apply a small amount to dry hands and rub in well, rinse well with clean running water.
